acceptance_targets: [chapter_06_booker_01] Reading the revised stretch from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:33 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:119, each major exchange must either reveal a new fact not already stated or visibly shift who holds leverage. If a paragraph in that span can be cut without losing either new information or a changed commitment, this finding remains open.

[chapter_06_craft_01] In the revised stretch from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:163 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:223, Majed must speak at least one line that names both sides of the tradeoff in his own mouth: the household security he is defending and the older woman's likely displacement. If his stake can still be understood only through Halima's interpretation or his body language, this finding fails.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised stretch from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:33 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:119, each major exchange must either reveal a new fact not already stated or visibly shift who holds leverage. If a paragraph in that span can be cut without losing either new information or a changed commitment, this finding remains open.
findings.problem: The central dilemma is legible early, but the middle third keeps rephrasing the same aunt-line-versus-birth-mother arithmetic instead of changing the scene's leverage. That circling delays the mother's entrance as a live pressure source and blunts the chapter's causal drive.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or differentiate the arithmetic passes at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:47, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:89 so each beat adds a new consequence rather than another paraphrase of the bind; either move the mother's entry forward near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:111 or make one of the pre-entry exchanges introduce a fresh fact, threat, or commitment that materially alters the choice before she appears.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised stretch from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:163 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:223, Majed must speak at least one line that names both sides of the tradeoff in his own mouth: the household security he is defending and the older woman's likely displacement. If his stake can still be understood only through Halima's interpretation or his body language, this finding fails.
findings.problem: After Jamila chooses the aunt-line, Majed retreats into narrated relief, shame, and errands instead of naming the bargain he is accepting. Because his household is one of the beneficiaries, that silence reads as timidity around the scene's ugliest consequence: the man protected by the claim is spared direct ownership of what the choice costs Jamila's mother.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the aftermath around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:163, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:205, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:221 so Majed explicitly acknowledges both what he is keeping (roof, claim, children's status) and what that may cost the older woman. Keep him in his provision-and-repair register; he should sound frightened and practical, not newly noble.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into contradiction: mercy that creates future damage, tenderness inside humiliation, and paperwork treated as an instrument of violence. In edge cases, choose the more socially and bodily specific version over the tasteful summary or thematic paraphrase.
aesthetic_risk_policy.edge_case_resolution: When a scene risks becoming too neat, keep the hurt visible and let no one explain it away too quickly. When a scene risks becoming lurid, keep it tethered to character perception, material fact, and consequence rather than spectacle.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If bodily pain, sexual threat, shame, hunger, or bureaucratic exclusion matter in a scene, they must register in specific lived detail; vague softening counts as a failed draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High in rendered English dialogue; contractions are the norm, with fuller forms reserved for emphasis, institutional performance, or character-specific formality.
dialogue_rules.dialect_rendering_policy: Render Bangla and char-specific speech through rhythm, hierarchy, metaphor, and social assumption, not through phonetic misspelling or exoticized broken English.
dialogue_rules.subtext_requirement: Most important exchanges should carry a visible practical agenda and a second, less speakable pressure beneath it, especially around kinship, shame, and money.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public pressure with private reckoning, crowd scenes with object-heavy aftermath, and dialogue-dense chapters with chapters driven by inventory, travel, weather, or delayed information. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same scene count, confrontation style, or emotional tempo.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, letting bureaucratic vocabulary and domestic vocabulary sit in the same paragraph without either swallowing the other; lyric lift should emerge from concrete detail, not ornamental abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third with one focal consciousness per scene, anchored primarily to Halima and opening selectively to Nura or Kashem only where the outline assigns that pressure.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Flexible sentence music: longer accrual sentences for weather, labor, and memory; short declarative cuts for administrative harm, revelation, and emotional impact.
